sn45.35:1.1:
1
At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, I will teach you asceticism and the fruits of asceticism. Listen to that …
sn45.35:1.2: "And what, bhikkhus, is asceticism? It is this Noble Eightfold Path; that is, right view … right concentration. This is called asceticism.
sn45.35:1.3: "And what, bhikkhus, are the fruits of asceticism? The fruit of stream-entry, the fruit of once-returning, the fruit of nonreturning, the fruit of arahantship. These are called the fruits of asceticism."
